compiled_state.title: [ticket-cli]: no sanctioned archive path for open orphan tickets -> requires ad-hoc git surgery
compiled_state.author: Worktree
compiled_state.description:
## Problem

No ticket CLI subcommand archives OPEN tickets. Available paths:

- `ticket-lifecycle.sh` — archives only tickets whose status=closed AND not reachable from any open ticket (compute_archive_eligible gate in ticket_graph/_hierarchy.py:117).
- `ticket compact` — internal event-history snapshot, not record retirement.

When test-fixture tickets leak into .tickets-tracker/ (e.g. from earlier Jira bridge work) they are open, unparented, and never become eligible for lifecycle-based archival. They accumulate indefinitely and degrade validate-issues.sh health.

## Reproduction

1. Observe orphaned test fixtures in validate-issues.sh output (e.g. titles 'test story', 'Bash-native test').
2. These are type=task/story, status=open, parent_id=null — compute_archive_eligible returns [] for them because they are not closed.
3. No ticket CLI invocation will archive them. Operator must:
   a. Write an ad-hoc script to emit ARCHIVED events per ticket_dir
   b. Write .archived marker files
   c. git add + git commit (manual) on the tickets branch
   d. git push (manual) — easy to forget

## Impact

- 82 test-fixture tickets required a one-off script (see session 2026-04-24) to clean up.
- The fix commit (8f509d2e63 on tickets branch) was made with PRE_COMMIT_ALLOW_NO_CONFIG=1 and is currently unpushed.
- Each future leak requires re-inventing the archival script.

## Expected

A sanctioned path such as:

    .claude/scripts/dso ticket archive <id> [--reason=...]
    .claude/scripts/dso ticket archive --from-file=<ids.txt>

that:

1. Emits ARCHIVED events (mirrors ticket-lifecycle.sh:135-143).
2. Writes .archived markers after durable commit.
3. Auto-commits on the tickets branch (matches the behavior of CREATE, STATUS, COMMENT, etc. which commit atomically via ticket-lib-api.sh).
4. Auto-pushes (or at minimum: exits with a clear 'run: ticket sync' instruction, matching lifecycle.sh step 5).

## Workaround

Ad-hoc script at /tmp/archive-orphans-*.sh from the 2026-04-24 session archives open tickets by directly writing ARCHIVED events + .archived markers. Not version-controlled, not tested, not a sanctioned path.
